summary: Pressure-aware tuning with OpenSearch container metrics

changes.description: Config-advisor now reads container memory pressure (docker stats ratio or OpenSearch p95) to scale down buffer pool, max_connections, tmp_table_size, and PHP max_children under high memory usage. Host-level cap prevents total buffer pool from exceeding 65% of VPS memory.

Tuning pipeline queries OpenSearch for 6-hour per-service container CPU and memory aggregates (avg, max, p95, pct above 80%) from Metricbeat data. These enrich the AI tuning payload and replace hourly docker stats spot-checks for pressure detection when available.
